headline: Netflix Stock Is Flirting With $70. Once-in-a-Decade Opportunity or Value Trap?
summary: Despite a fantastic 711% trailing-10-year return, Netflix shares are currently 45% off their peak.

headline: Netflix Vs. Walt Disney: Netflix Prints Cold Hard Cash While Disney Bleeds to Fund Parks and Linear Cable Remnants
summary: Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) and Walt Disney (NYSE: DIS) just reported quarters showing two opposite business models behind the same word: streaming. Netflix delivered an asset-light cash haul. Disney posted a record parks quarter and streaming profitability inflection, but carried a heavy capital bill. The contrast matters as discretionary budgets tighten. Netflix Squeezes Cash. Disney Buys ... Netflix Vs. Walt Disney: Netflix Prints Cold Hard Cash While Disney Bleeds to Fund Parks and Linear Cable R
